## Summary

- 

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build:chrome`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when behavior, UI, permissions, or release path changes
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev` when dependencies or release path changes
- [ ] `npm run zip` when release packaging changes

## Data Safety

- [ ] No cookie values are displayed or logged.
- [ ] No archive passwords are stored or logged.
- [ ] Destructive cookie behavior is not made default.
- [ ] Docs updated for permission or data handling changes.
- [ ] Migration report changes still exclude cookie values and archive passwords.
- [ ] Screenshots or short clips attached for visible side panel UI changes.
